title: Election exit poll 2026 LIVE updates: Projections expected after 6:30 pm today
description: Election exit poll 2026 LIVE updates: Projections for assembly elections to four states - Assam, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, West Bengal - and the Union territory of Puducherry from 6:30 pm today. Election Commission has ordered a ban on release of exit polls from 7 am April 9 till 6:30 pm today.
